subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-03-12
subcodes.first_line: All the efforts of these people in this or other direction are like unto the vanishing traceries made on the mirror-like surface of water.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @wisdom [hikmat], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @idle fancies; lust and passion, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
